controls.title: Wajib Eloquent ORM, dilarang raw query
controls.evidence: Semua akses DB harus via Eloquent. DB::raw()/DB::select() dilarang kecuali aggregasi kompleks. Ref: ASVS V5, CWE-89

controls.title: Mass assignment protection via $guarded
controls.evidence: Semua model HARUS $guarded=["id"]. Tidak $fillable. Ref: CWE-915

controls.title: Blade escaping, dilarang {!! !!} tanpa sanitasi
controls.evidence: Output Blade HARUS {{ }}. {!! !!} hanya untuk HTML dari Citadel renderSchema(). Ref: CWE-79

controls.title: Middleware auth pada protected routes
controls.evidence: Route admin: cek_login+internal_placement. Route API: basic_auth/jwt.verify. Ref: ASVS V4, CWE-862

controls.title: Inline validation wajib di controller
controls.evidence: Setiap store()/update() HARUS $request->validate([...]). Project tidak pakai Form Request class

controls.title: Citadel Page lifecycle pattern wajib
controls.evidence: Controller HARUS ikuti: ComponentsPage::make()->view()->business()->schema()->render()

controls.title: HasCreator trait wajib pada model bisnis
controls.evidence: Model entitas bisnis HARUS trait HasCreator untuk tracking created_by/updated_by. Ref: SOX Compliance

controls.title: ActivityLogged trait wajib pada model bisnis
controls.evidence: Model entitas bisnis HARUS trait ActivityLogged (Spatie) untuk pencatatan perubahan

controls.title: Enum status dengan label() dan color()
controls.evidence: Field status HARUS PHP 8.1 Enum dengan label():string dan color():string. Implement CitadelEnum

controls.title: Custom table name dengan prefix escm_
controls.evidence: Semua model HARUS $table property eksplisit dengan prefix escm_. Tidak boleh auto naming

controls.title: Permission check via checkAccessPermission()
controls.evidence: Setiap controller method bisnis HARUS checkAccessPermission($permission) di awal. Format: feature:action. Ref: ASVS V4

controls.title: Aksi non-CRUD sebagai method tersendiri
controls.evidence: Operasi bisnis (propose/release/sync/approve/esign) HARUS method tersendiri, bukan generic update

controls.title: Schema component harus implement Backbone
controls.evidence: Komponen dalam schema([...]) HARUS implement Backbone interface. Pelanggaran = error BACKBONE[001]

controls.title: Makeable pattern untuk factory instantiation
controls.evidence: Citadel component HARUS via ::make($name, $title). Dilarang new ComponentClass() langsung

controls.title: HasNumbering trait untuk auto-numbering
controls.evidence: Model procurement (Tender/PO/PR/Contract) HARUS trait HasNumbering + interface UseNumbering

controls.title: Tidak ada Observer class, semua di boot method
controls.evidence: Project TIDAK pakai Observer class. Event handling via boot()/bootTraitName() di trait

controls.title: Tidak ada Form Request class, validasi inline
controls.evidence: TIDAK pakai Form Request class. Semua validasi inline $request->validate() di controller

controls.title: $guarded bukan $fillable
controls.evidence: Standar: $guarded=["id"] bukan $fillable. Semua field selain id bisa mass-assign

controls.title: Response pattern: apiRes() helper untuk JSON
controls.evidence: Response JSON HARUS apiRes('success'/'error', ...). Form sukses: Citadel Swal::make('success')

controls.title: Sync mechanism mandatory untuk data eksternal
controls.evidence: Data dari SAP/HCMS/VMS/Pengadaan.com HARUS punya sync service dedicated di app/Sync/Service/

controls.title: Sync service harus extend Base
controls.evidence: Sync service HARUS extend App\Sync\Service\Base. Implement: fetching(), handleResponseForCache(), saving()

controls.title: Scope-based data access multi-tenant
controls.evidence: Akses data procurement HARUS ESCM::scopeProject(auth()->user()). Ref: CWE-639 IDOR

controls.title: Password/PIN masking di semua log
controls.evidence: Middleware logging HARUS masking: password, password_confirm, pass, pin. Ref: CWE-532

controls.title: SoftDeletes hanya untuk entitas tertentu
controls.evidence: SoftDeletes HANYA pada User/Vendor/VendorQuotation. Mayoritas model pakai status flag

controls.title: Relationship key menggunakan business key
controls.evidence: Beberapa relationship pakai business key (nomor dokumen) bukan surrogate key. Konsistensi SAP

controls.title: Approval workflow via morphMany pattern
controls.evidence: Model approval HARUS implement ApprovableContract + trait ReleaseStrategyModel. Polymorphic morphMany

controls.title: Procurement module interface wajib
controls.evidence: Entitas procurement HARUS implement ProcurementModule dengan getProcurementNumber() dan historyModelName()

controls.title: Explicit route definition, bukan Route::resource()
controls.evidence: TIDAK pakai Route::resource(). Semua route eksplisit per method untuk kontrol granular

controls.title: Multi-layer authentication
controls.evidence: 3 layer: Session (cek_login) + BasicAuth+IP (basic_auth) + JWT (jwt.verify). Ref: Defense in Depth

controls.title: CSRF protection tanpa exception
controls.evidence: CSRF aktif untuk semua POST/PUT/DELETE. VerifyCsrfToken $except HARUS kosong. Ref: CWE-352
